   98 - \left( \frac{86 - 52}{98 - 73} \right) = 43

Putting it all together, the equation is:
\[
98 - \left( \frac{86 - 52}{98 - 73} \right) = 43
\]

So, the final answer is:
\[
\boxed{98 - \left( \frac{86 - 52}{98 - 73} \right) = 43}
\]
